lines.text: Be good, please!
Encore and Uncle Aalto won't do anything bad to you...
Encore just did as Aalto said! Encore is usually a good girl.
A plant-type Resonator? We happen to know someone like that too, don't we?
Aww... Pwease help us... Pretty Pweeaaase...?
Here you are! Hurray!
Yes! Encore knows him!
Uncle Aalto sells stuff without a license, he listens in on people for commercial secrets, and he loves pulling pranks on us kids... But he’s not a bad guy, really!
Don't worry! Encore's had plenty of that mushroom already!
Because... Because Encore must keep an eye on {Male=him;Female=her}!
Hey, Aalto? Didn't you send Encore there? Wait... Why are they all giving you the side eye?
Hey, Aalto! Wait for meeee!
That's because Aalto set off the security alarm! And now the gate's closed, hmph!
But why did they keep that big guy here?
Yep! Encore can prove it! The Threnodian is a bad, bad guy, and Encore and Aalto are the heroes of justice, so we're gonna stop the bad guys!
Hey, Aalto! WAAITT!
Wow... She's so pretty...
Wow! A big cluncky monster!
Aalto, we doing it like we usually do?
Hehe, then this big guy is Encore's to tackle!
Cosmos, Cloudy, ATTACK!
Hehe, Encore is strong! Told ya!
Oh, settle down you two. The Wooly Warrior will come out once everyone's nicely in their seats.
Plus, Encore's still waiting for a friend. Ah, there {Male=he;Female=she} is!
Rover!
Encore finally got to see you again!
Encore was wondering if you'd come, and even had Cosmos and Cloudy go scouting for you.
Encore wants you to come play with us and listen to our stories!
Everyone was so busy the last time Encore's here in Jinzhou, we didn't even get to play together.
But Encore won't let that happen again, cuz Encore's here on vacation this time!
Of course, they do. Everyone at Black Shores is really nice. Even someone as busy as Aalto gets to have them.
What? Encore doesn't know anything about any homework.
Anyway, since we finally got some free time, I told Aalto I wanted to visit some friends in Jinzhou.
But he just lay in his chair, bragged about how he has so much grown-up stuff to worry about and was too busy for playtime.
Oh, poor grown-ups, they're always so busy. They don't even have time for stories.
Well, too bad for Aalto. All I could do was come here by myself with my stories and Aalto's wallet.
Right, let me introduce you to everyone, but I think most of them have heard about you already.
Gather round everyone. Encore presents to you {PlayerName}! Savior of Jinzhou. Hero of heroes!
Oh, stop trying to hide it already!
Uh-huh! There's plenty more of them! This time Encore's got a whole new story to tell!
It's about the adventures of the Wooly Warrior. You'll love it.
That's right! Adventures are the best!
Wait till you hear the actual story. I don't wanna spoil anything just yet!
So, wanna hear Encore's stories?
If you enjoy stories, Rover, you might even get to go inside one. Whaddya say, Woolies?
Great! Come, Encore's even saved a front-row seat just for you!
All right. Settle down everyone. The story's about to start!
Well, that's too bad. I guess you have more important things to take care of...
But, if you ever wanna hear some stories, come find Encore. Encore's saved a front-row seat just for you!
All right. Settle down everyone. The story's about to start!
Nope, today's story will be about the Wooly Warrior and how she makes her wishes come true.
The story begins in a land of boundless imagination known as the Wooly Kingdom...
Legend says, that deep within the kingdom's castle lies a magical gateway. Whoever passes through it can have any wish come true!
To reach this gateway, you must first go over a great many obstacles.
Yet, countless adventurers still choose to embark on this journey, for each holds wishes to fulfill.
Before setting off on their quests, Fairy Cloudy will ask them:
Ooh, so this is the kind of choice a grown-up would make!
That's something the Wooly Warrior would say! Maybe the two of you can team up and adventure together!
See? Everyone's wishes are different, which also make their journeys unique!
And among these people, there's a small adventurer that goes by the name of "Wooly Warrior." When asked about her desires, she replies:
Fairy Cloudy, greatly puzzled by this reply, goes on to ask:
Fairy Cloudy nods in approval and offers her guidance to the little warrior.
So, does the Wooly Warrior's companion accept this invitation?
{PlayerName}, welcome back from the Wooly Kingdom!
Yuppers! It's where all the Wooly stories begin. Cosmos and Cloudy's home!
With their help, Encore can even invite friends for a visit!
But not everyone though. The Wooly Kingdom won't welcome anyone who thinks the stories are just made up.
You're different. You're one of Encore's best friends and have listened to my stories. So Encore wanted to give you a surprise!
I know, right? You and I work great as a team!
Really? But you have to admit, the part where Wooly Warrior kicked monster butts was suuuper cool, right?
Encore really enjoys this story. In it, Wooly Warrior and her companions worked their way out of all kinds of trouble. Just like we did.
Mom said that as long as you believe, the stories will give you strength. So whenever I think of them, it makes my heart feel warm.
And Encore wants to share this warm feeling with you and make you happy too!
Because Encore loves to play and adventure with you! It's just that everyone was so busy last time...
But, this time Encore's here on vacation! Curious about what happens next in the story, Rover?
If you are, you should join Encore's adventure team, that way we can go and find out its ending together!
Umm... Sure, you can be captain and Encore will be the vice-captain!
Ohh, it's not make-believe, this is a serious adventure game! I've been playing it ever since I was little, it'll be a blast! This time, you can be the team captain and I can be the vice-captain!
Now, for our first team assignment, let's go find out everyone's thoughts on the story!
The joys of the story should be shared with everyone. It's not just my story.
Once we know what the audience thinks, we'll know how to work on the story going forward!
After all, it's the applause that makes for a curtain call!
Okay! Let's see...
Look! That girl by herself over there, Encore wonders what she thinks about the story... Come on. Let's go ask her!
Why are there so many Tick Tacks? Are they having a party?
No need to be afraid, Ying! We'll keep you safe!
You probably don't know this, but Wooly Warrior once met a huge cat monster a hundred times stronger than her, and she was so scared that her legs were trembling!
That's right, but even so, she stood her ground.
Because she had all of her friends behind her, she had to fight.
Just like the situation we're in now. Ya can't let a few small TDs beat you down.
It's the mountain-chopping Sword of Courage!
Quick. What does it say?
Is the proof of your courage.
Uh uh...
Anything else? Did the letter mention any clues about the next relic? We still have two to go!
Then let's go check it out! Sounds like it'll be a treasure hunt in the sand!
We're here! At long last, the brave adventurers reach their second destination, and thus they start a hunt for the legendary Shield of Faith on this sand-covered beach.
They say only the bravest adventurers can find it as it puts their will to the test.
Yeah! That's the spirit!
Oh, you don't wanna jinx it.
Ying can go left, Encore will go right, and you can take care of the middle!
If anyone finds anything interesting, show me and we can take a look at it together!
But look at how well-made it is! With the Sword of Courage in one hand, and the Shield of Faith in the other, it's an invincible combo!
The person who crafted this shield really knew their stuff!
Time for clues about the next relic. The Wreath of Hope.
Hurry, Ying! What does it say?
The garden?
Fantastic! Then that's our next stop! Onwards!
This place... feels empty. There's nothing here.
Oh, Ying...
Our captain hasn't announced the end of our adventure yet, and you're thinking about leaving already?
Well, okay then. Let's call it a day right here. There's some stuff I need to wrap my head around too...
I remember you asked me about the ending of the Wooly Warrior, right?
Even though we finished finding the relics, Team Wooly's adventure goes on.
There are still plenty of stories to tell... Oh, I know!
How about you come to Encore's story session tomorrow afternoon?
Yes! If you want to find out what happens to Team Wooly, come over and listen to the rest of the story. Be there or be square!
Yup. See you tomorrow, Ying.
{PlayerName}, do you think this is a good ending to the story?
Mm-hmm. After all, Ying got the treasures left by her mother.
If this was a story, it would end something like this: "In the end, the little warrior managed to collect all of the relics left by her mother, realizing her intentions."
Yeah! After all, Ying didn't receive the wreath and she didn't get to see her mother.
Even though in the end, the little warrior did manage to collect all of the relics left by her, realizing her mother's intentions.
But Encore still feels like something's missing.
In this ending, she didn't even make it to the Gateway of Wishes.
Just like in the story of the Wooly Warrior.
What do you think? Will the Wooly Warrior's wish come true in the end?
If it comes true, then she should be able to see her family again.
After such a wonderful and interesting adventure, she must have so much to say to them.
Even if her wish doesn't come true, the Wooly Warrior will still continue on her adventures.
She's met so many new friends and has tons of stories to share. She'll remember the people and things she met on this journey.
But actually, there is no true ending to Wooly Warrior's story.
Remember the play Ying told us about when she showed us the treasure map?
Ying said she'd already forgotten what most of the play was about.
All she could remember was that the hero had been searching for a legendary treasure to make their wishes come true.
I knew straight away that the treasure map wasn't for the Wooly Warrior's sword.
But it was a gift left to her by Ying's mother.
Wanna guess how I found out?
Yes. That play was about the Wooly Warrior's story, and I remember each and every part of it.
Because that play...
Was a gift from my Mom.
Now, time for a story from Encore.
Mom told me that once the applause starts at the final show of our tour, she'd take me onto the stage to make a wish.
But she collapsed before the play ended.
I was so scared. I tried to come up with ways to make her feel better. I even kept a daily to-do list.
At the time, I thought that if I stayed a good girl like the characters in the stories, Mom would get better and better...
But her illness got worse. She didn't get better, and the Gateway of Wishes never appeared.
Encore didn't know what to do anymore.
Mom just asked me to sit by her bed and tell her stories.
So I told her about Warrior Cosmos, Fairy Cloudy, and many other things.
She always smiled each time.
It was right around that time when Cosmos and Cloudy appeared from the stories.
Mom told me they're a part of life, and these stories will always be with me.
After she left, Encore had to become the Wooly Warrior, going on adventures on her own.
Whether it was in the orphanage or with the Black Shores, Encore would write down everything she experienced.
With these stories, Mom will know what kind of adventures Encore had, and all the friends Encore made.
Later on, Encore wanted to continue writing the Wooly Warrior's story. But this time, it's a bit different from before.
Now she has her own friends. Friends that she can adventure together to find the Gateway of Wishes.
Because finding that gateway...
Is the only way she can tell all her stories to her mom so she knows how well she did.
That's why...
Yeah. She said she had a lot to say to her mother.
Just like me. There's so much Encore wants to say and so many stories that Encore wants Mom to hear.
Our time with Ying reminded me of all of that.
Even though Wooly Warrior's story has no true ending...
Will Ying's be any different? Will she be able to make her wish come true?
In the end, Ying said the adventure is over, and it's just a story...
She said she was happy and satisfied with that, but Encore saw that look on her face.
She looked really, really sad.
Encore knows how it feels. Just like how it used to be. No matter what Encore did, Mom wouldn't get any better.
My stories were the only things that could make her feel happy...
It was Mom who made me understand the power of stories.
That's why after I went on this journey alone, Cosmos and Cloudly came out of the land of imagination.
And it's why Encore told Ying that our adventure should not end like this.
This story deserves a better ending.
{PlayerName}...
Agreed! The story must have an ending!
But what should we do?
There's no way we can bring Ying's mother back. I mean, the Gateway of Wishes doesn't actually exist in real life...
In the story?
Encore sees what you mean!
Encore can invite you and Ying into the Wooly Kingdom, and go on a real adventure with me—the Wooly Warrior!
But... the Kingdom isn't someplace you can go willy-nilly.
Only those who believe in the Kingdom can visit...
That's for sure! We're a team together!
We should make a wreath for her and let her know that our adventure's not over yet!
Encore remembers it went something like this, the wreath is "A crown of flowers that can reflect a person's thoughts. Never withers, forever blossoming."
How are we gonna make it?
You mean... Verina!
That's right! Verina loves flowers, she's a flower's best friend!
Let's see if she has any ideas.
Hi Verina, er, not exactly. we're here to ask you how we can make the Wreath of Hope.
Yeah, I remember you created a Blake Bloom for Rover that one time!
Feelings...
Oh! I know!
Since we can't really make a wreath of flowers exactly like the one in the story, we can make one using our feelings!
Yes! Exactly!
When me and Mom made wreaths, she'd always ask me to pick my favorite flowers.
If I was feeling happy, I would choose a bright red flower, since it made my heart feel warm. If I was feeling unhappy, I would take a blue one.
At this point, it really doesn't matter what kind of flower it is. All that matters is everyone's feelings!
We should make a wreath, and tell Ying our wishes to make our dreams come true!
That's right! Let's find flowers that can express our feelings!
When she sees the wreath, she'll definitely realize that the story of our team is still going!
This way, we can all visit the Wooly Kingdom together, and maybe our wishes can come true!
Great! Thank you, Verina! Off we go!
{PlayerName}, you're here!
You're right on time. Encore has just set everything up.
Of course not, you're right on time. Encore has just set everything up.
See this little stage? Cosmos and Cloudy helped me set it up. Pretty impressive, don'tcha think?
Cloudy says, "Right on. That's teamwork for ya!"
"Hmph. Give us some extra time, and we can make one bigger than that giant gate of Jinzhou. Baa!" Says Cosmos.
Audition? That actually sounds like a good idea. Then you can be part of Encore's cheerleading squad, {PlayerName}!
I know this is just a small stage for storytelling. I wanted to try the way Mom used to do it. She and I started the Wooly Warrior story after all.
Besides, it'll be more fun this way!
Encore wonders if Ying will show up today. We didn't really pinky-promise...
All right. Now that Team Wooly's fully assembled, is everyone ready for the story?
This is the small stage Encore made for the play, where the warrior's adventure continues.
Does anyone remember where we last left off?
That's right. The Wooly Warrior sets out to find the three relics. This time she is not alone. She tries to climb to the top of the highest mountain with her trusty companions.
With the mountain being so high up, the waves raging below them, she nearly falls several times, but her friends manage to keep her steady.
In the end, she obtains the legendary Sword of Courage.
Later, she arrives at a beach, filled with sand as far as the eye can see. She searches and searches, and all she can find are just some tiny shells.
But with the help from her friends, the Shield of Faith is uncovered. Only the Wreath remains.
Unfortunately, no. After reaching the mythical Sea of Flowers, all the flowers have withered. No matter where she searches, the Wreath of Hope is nowhere to be found.
Yet, her companions want to finish this adventure for her.
They gather flowers and weave their feelings into the shape of a crown.
The pink flowers are meant to make her feel happy, the blue flowers are hopes that she will not be scared of any obstacles...
This wreath brings together all the feelings and emotions of the companions during their adventure. Their gift to her.
Her companions remark so. The wreath isn't fully completed. It's missing a very important flower.
Ying, this wreath is missing the flower that represents your feelings and wishes.
What if we could find one?
What if we can find an iris and the Gateway of Wishes? Will you want to continue on this adventure, Ying?
That's right! Because stories aren't just stories. When you believe in them, they'll really exist.
Just like how it is now. With everyone's feelings combined into the wreath, it slowly turns into a door. A door that leads to the deepest parts of the Wooly Kingdom.
Inside, the irises continue to bloom.
So, do you believe in it and choose to continue this adventure?
Great. Off we go!
And just like that, the little warrior's wish's come true, putting a perfect ending to this adventure story.
The warrior finally gets to meet her mother, telling her all the stories and words she has always wanted to tell.
But the warrior's journey won't end here, as the path ahead is a long one.
Be sure to share our story with everyone!
Time for another feedback session from the audience. What do you think of this story?
Hehe, Encore loves this ending!
But the parts where everyone was fighting as a team were super, super cool!
Encore loves this ending!
The Wooly Warrior finally fulfilled her wish, and she got to tell her mother all her stories.
About the companions she got to meet.
Who she went on adventures with, defeating all kinds of monsters that stood in their way!
Their search for the sword and shield as a team, and how they put together the Wreath of Hope.
We've been to many places together, but there's so much more to go, and so many adventures and stories to write about.
These stories are an extension of life, they are...
Yeah. Stories with happy endings! Mom said the same thing.
Yeah, Encore had never thought of such an ending when telling the Wooly Warrior story in the past.
I really enjoyed how it ended.
The story of the Wooly Warrior's search for the relics is finished, and my vacation is about to end. It's time to head back to Black Shores...
Well, we are kinda busy over there most of the year.
Oh, enough with the homework already.
No biggie. Even though this story is over, Encore will make sure to prepare a new adventure next time we meet!
Let's be on the same team together, and you can still be the captain! Wanna do a pinky promise?
I pinky promise that we'll write as many stories as we can together...
As a team...
Pinky promised!
You betcha!
Wait till you see what else we can do! Am I right, {PlayerName}?
We'll take on anything they chuck at us!
Are you sure? Doesn't look like you are. Lemme give you a quick check-up...
Oh! Cut it out already!
Quick, let's check and see if the sword's around here. Is that some kind of puzzle over there? Do we need to put something inside of it to activate it?
It's a bit too high for Ying and me to reach.
And just like that, the little warrior's wish's come true, putting a perfect ending to this adventure story.
The warrior finally gets to meet her mother, telling her all the stories and words she has always wanted to tell.
But the warrior's journey won't end here, as the path ahead is a long one.
Be sure to share our story with everyone!
Time for another feedback session from the audience. What do you think of this story?
Hehe, Encore loves this ending!
But the parts where everyone was fighting as a team were super, super cool!
Encore loves this ending!
The Wooly Warrior finally fulfilled her wish, and she got to tell her mother all her stories.
About the companions she got to meet.
Who she went on adventures with, defeating all kinds of monsters that stood in their way!
Their search for the sword and shield as a team, and how they put together the Wreath of Hope.
We've been to many places together, but there's so much more to go, and so many adventures and stories to write about.
These stories are an extension of life, they are...
Yeah. Stories with happy endings! Mom said the same thing.
Yeah, Encore had never thought of such an ending when telling the Wooly Warrior story in the past.
I really enjoyed how it ended.
The story of the Wooly Warrior's search for the relics is finished, and my vacation is about to end. It's time to head back to Black Shores...
Well, we are kinda busy over there most of the year.
Oh, enough with the homework already.
No biggie. Even though this story is over, Encore will make sure to prepare a new adventure next time we meet!
Let's be on the same team together, and you can still be the captain! Wanna do a pinky promise?
I pinky promise that we'll write as many stories as we can together...
As a team...
Pinky promised!
Ta-da! Welcome to the world of <te href=800003>Second Coming of Solaris</te>!
Tethys generated everything here after scanning you. Pretty amazing, right? Of course, Encore helped too! See that huge cake over there? That's Encore's design!
Because I turned you into one! Miss Shorekeeper could only grant me a tiny bit of Tethys' computing power, so this <te href=800004>Cube</te> is the best I could manage for you.
Look, it's an Abby Cube!
Uh-uh. Only you and me are real here. The rest are replicas based on the scan results.
I followed Miss Shorekeeper's instructions and made 12 different Cubes! They should all be here... Huh?
Where's the cake?
Nope, only one.
Hello, Abbowser! Did you hide the <te href=800002>Anniversary Cake</te>?
